classification_rule: One primary type per objective; types influence recommendations but do not change governance.

types.name: Strategic Objective
types.description: Long-horizon institutional direction tied to mission outcomes.

types.name: Operational Objective
types.description: Day-to-day execution outcomes supporting active Initiatives.

types.name: Community Objective
types.description: Community-facing change the institution intends to create.

types.name: Legislative Objective
types.description: Policy or civic outcomes requiring governed advocacy.

types.name: Campaign Objective
types.description: Time-bounded mobilization targets with measurable reach.

types.name: Financial Objective
types.description: Funding, budget, or resource sustainability outcomes.

types.name: Volunteer Objective
types.description: Volunteer recruitment, retention, or capacity outcomes.

types.name: Membership Objective
types.description: Membership growth, engagement, or retention outcomes.

types.name: Emergency Objective
types.description: Short-horizon urgent outcomes under emergency governance.
